user_story: Chào bạn nhé, hôm nay bạn khỏe không?

data.counselor_message: Mình chưa hiểu rõ tâm trạng hiện tại của bạn lắm. Bạn có thể chia sẻ chi tiết hơn một chút để mình có thể tìm được bộ phim 'bắt' đúng tần số của bạn không?

user_story: Tôi vừa bị sa thải sau 3 năm cống hiến. Tôi thấy bất công và lo lắng cho tương lai, cảm giác mình là một kẻ thất bại.

data.counselor_message:
Mình rất tiếc khi nghe bạn đang trải qua một giai đoạn khó khăn như vậy. Cảm giác bất công và lo lắng là điều hoàn toàn tự nhiên. Dưới đây là một số bộ phim có thể giúp bạn tìm thấy sự động viên và cảm hứng:

1. **The Karate Kid**: Bộ phim này nhấn mạnh tầm quan trọng của sự kiên nhẫn và trưởng thành. Nhân vật chính học cách đối mặt với khó khăn và tìm thấy sức mạnh bên trong mình. Điều này có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng, dù hiện tại có khó khăn, bạn vẫn có thể vượt qua và trưởng thành từ những thử thách.

2. **Undisputed III: Redemption**: Đây là câu chuyện về sự phục hồi và tìm lại danh dự. Nhân vật chính phải đối mặt với những khó khăn lớn và tìm cách đứng dậy từ thất bại. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn về việc không bao giờ từ bỏ và luôn tìm cách để đứng lên mạnh mẽ hơn.

3. **The Social Network**: Bộ phim này cho thấy rằng thành công không đến dễ dàng và thường đi kèm với những thách thức và xung đột. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng mọi người đều có những lúc khó khăn, nhưng điều quan trọng là cách bạn đối mặt và vượt qua chúng.

4. **127 Hours**: Câu chuyện về sự kiên cường và ý chí sống sót. Nhân vật chính phải đối mặt với tình huống tưởng chừng như không thể vượt qua, nhưng anh đã tìm thấy sức mạnh bên trong để tiếp tục. Điều này có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng bạn mạnh mẽ hơn bạn nghĩ.

5. **Eat Pray Love**: Bộ phim này nói về hành trình tìm kiếm bản thân và hạnh phúc. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng đôi khi, những thay đổi lớn trong cuộc sống là cơ hội để khám phá và tìm thấy điều gì thực sự quan trọng đối với bạn.

Hy vọng rằng những bộ phim này sẽ mang lại cho bạn một chút an ủi và động lực để tiếp tục tiến lên. Bạn không đơn độc, và mình tin rằng bạn sẽ tìm thấy con đường của mình.

recommended_movies.title: The Karate Kid
recommended_movies.cast: Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson, Wenwen Han, Wang ZhenWei
recommended_movies.country: China, Hong Kong, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Twelve-year-old Dre Parker could have been the most popular kid in Detroit, but his mother's latest career move has landed him in China. Dre immediately falls for his classmate Mei Ying but the cultural differences make such a friendship impossible. Even worse, Dre's feelings make him an enemy of the class bully, Cheng. With no friends in a strange land, Dre has nowhere to turn but maintenance man Mr. Han, who is a kung fu master. As Han teaches Dre that kung fu is not about punches and parries, but maturity and calm, Dre realizes that facing down the bullies will be the fight of his life.

recommended_movies.title: Undisputed III: Redemption
recommended_movies.cast: Scott Adkins, Mykel Shannon Jenkins, Mark Ivanir, Hristo Shopov, Marko Zaror
recommended_movies.description: Russian inmate Boyka, now severely hobbled by the knee injury suffered at the end of Undisputed 2. No longer the feared prison fighter he was, he has declined so far that he is now good only for cleaning toilets. But when a new prison fight tournament begins - an international affair, matching the best fighters from prisons around the globe, enticing them with the promise of freedom for the winner - Boyka must reclaim his dignity and fight for his position in the tournament.

recommended_movies.title: The Social Network
recommended_movies.cast: Jesse Eisenberg, Andrew Garfield, Armie Hammer, Josh Pence, Justin Timberlake
recommended_movies.description: In 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programmer Mark Zuckerberg begins work on a new concept that eventually turns into the global social network known as Facebook. Six years later, Mark is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend.

recommended_movies.title: The Town
recommended_movies.cast: Ben Affleck, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Hall, Jon Hamm, Blake Lively
recommended_movies.country: United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Doug MacRay is a longtime thief, who, smarter than the rest of his crew, is looking for his chance to exit the game. When a bank job leads to the group kidnapping an attractive branch manager, he takes on the role of monitoring her – but their burgeoning relationship threatens to unveil the identities of Doug and his crew to the FBI Agent who is on their case.

recommended_movies.title: Black Swan
recommended_movies.cast: Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, Vincent Cassel, Barbara Hershey, Winona Ryder
recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: Elite Squad: The Enemy Within
recommended_movies.cast: Wagner Moura, Irandhir Santos, André Ramiro, Pedro Van-Held, Maria Ribeiro
recommended_movies.description: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor.

recommended_movies.title: 127 Hours
recommended_movies.cast: James Franco, Kate Mara, Amber Tamblyn, Clémence Poésy, Lizzy Caplan
recommended_movies.country: France, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: The true story of mountain climber Aron Ralston's remarkable adventure to save himself after a fallen boulder crashes on his arm and traps him in an isolated canyon in Utah.

recommended_movies.title: Incendies
recommended_movies.cast: Lubna Azabal, Mélissa Désormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette, Rémy Girard, Allen Altman
recommended_movies.description: A mother's last wishes send twins Jeanne and Simon on a journey to Middle East in search of their tangled roots. Adapted from Wajdi Mouawad's acclaimed play, Incendies tells the powerful and moving tale of two young adults' voyage to the core of deep-rooted hatred, never-ending wars and enduring love.

recommended_movies.title: Love & Other Drugs
recommended_movies.cast: Jake Gyllenhaal, Anne Hathaway, Oliver Platt, Hank Azaria, Josh Gad
recommended_movies.description: Maggie is an alluring free spirit who won't let anyone – or anything – tie her down. But she meets her match in Jamie, whose relentless and nearly infallible charm serves him well with the ladies and the cutthroat world of pharmaceutical sales. Maggie and Jamie's evolving relationship takes them both by surprise, as they find themselves under the influence of the ultimate drug: love.

recommended_movies.title: Eat Pray Love
recommended_movies.cast: Julia Roberts, Javier Bardem, James Franco, Billy Crudup, Richard Jenkins
recommended_movies.description: Liz Gilbert had everything a modern woman is supposed to dream of having – a husband, a house and a successful career – yet like so many others, she found herself lost, confused and searching for what she really wanted in life. Newly divorced and at a crossroads, Gilbert steps out of her comfort zone, risking everything to change her life, embarking on a journey around the world that becomes a quest for self-discovery. In her travels, she discovers the true pleasure of nourishment by eating in Italy, the power of prayer in India and, finally and unexpectedly, the inner peace and balance of true love in Bali.

recommended_movies.title: My Name Is Khan
recommended_movies.cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Kajol, Arjan Aujla, Jimmy Shergill, Sonya Jehan
recommended_movies.country: China, India, United Arab Emirates, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.

recommended_movies.title: Blue Valentine
recommended_movies.cast: Ryan Gosling, Michelle Williams, John Doman, Mike Vogel, Ben Shenkman
recommended_movies.description: Dean and Cindy live a quiet life in a modest neighborhood. They appear to have the world at their feet at the outset of the relationship. However, his lack of ambition and her retreat into self-absorption cause potentially irreversible cracks in their marriage.

recommended_movies.title: Robin Hood
recommended_movies.cast: Russell Crowe, Cate Blanchett, Max von Sydow, William Hurt, Mark Strong
recommended_movies.description: When soldier Robin happens upon the dying Robert of Loxley, he promises to return the man's sword to his family in Nottingham. There, he assumes Robert's identity; romances his widow, Marion; and draws the ire of the town's sheriff and King John's henchman, Godfrey.

recommended_movies.title: Due Date
recommended_movies.cast: Robert Downey Jr., Zach Galifianakis, Michelle Monaghan, Jamie Foxx, Juliette Lewis
recommended_movies.description: Peter Highman must scramble across the US in five days to be present for the birth of his first child. He gets off to a bad start when his wallet and luggage are stolen, and put on the 'no-fly' list. Peter embarks on a terrifying journey when he accepts a ride from an actor.

user_story: Người yêu 5 năm của tôi vừa nói lời chia tay để đi du học. Tôi thấy trống rỗng và không còn tin vào tình yêu nữa.

data.counselor_message:
Mình rất tiếc khi nghe về tình huống của bạn. Mình hiểu cảm giác trống rỗng và mất niềm tin vào tình yêu có thể rất khó khăn. Dưới đây là một số bộ phim có thể giúp bạn tìm thấy sự đồng cảm và có cái nhìn mới mẻ hơn về cuộc sống và tình yêu:

1. **Shutter Island**: Bộ phim này không chỉ là một câu chuyện ly kỳ mà còn là một hành trình khám phá tâm lý sâu sắc. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng đôi khi, những gì chúng ta thấy và cảm nhận không phải lúc nào cũng là sự thật, và việc đối mặt với nỗi đau có thể dẫn đến sự hiểu biết sâu sắc hơn về bản thân.

2. **The Twilight Saga: Eclipse**: Dù là một câu chuyện tình yêu giả tưởng, nhưng nó nhấn mạnh vào việc lựa chọn và sự phức tạp của tình cảm. Nó có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng tình yêu không phải lúc nào cũng đơn giản, và đôi khi, việc buông bỏ cũng là một phần của hành trình tìm kiếm hạnh phúc.

3. **The Social Network**: Bộ phim này không chỉ nói về sự thành công mà còn về những mối quan hệ và sự phản bội. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng cuộc sống có nhiều khía cạnh khác nhau và đôi khi, việc tập trung vào sự phát triển cá nhân có thể mang lại những điều tốt đẹp hơn.

4. **Three Steps Above Heaven**: Đây là một câu chuyện về tình yêu đầu đời và những thử thách mà nó mang lại. Nó có thể giúp bạn nhớ lại những cảm xúc mãnh liệt của tình yêu và nhận ra rằng mỗi mối quan hệ đều có giá trị riêng, dù kết thúc như thế nào.

5. **The Town**: Bộ phim này nói về sự thay đổi và tìm kiếm một cuộc sống tốt đẹp hơn. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn để tìm kiếm những điều mới mẻ và không ngừng tiến về phía trước, ngay cả khi mọi thứ trở nên khó khăn.

Hy vọng rằng những bộ phim này có thể mang lại cho bạn một góc nhìn mới và giúp bạn vượt qua giai đoạn khó khăn này. Mình luôn ở đây để lắng nghe bạn.

recommended_movies.title: Shutter Island
recommended_movies.cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Mark Ruffalo, Ben Kingsley, Max von Sydow, Michelle Williams
recommended_movies.description: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommended_movies.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
recommended_movies.cast: Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner, Bryce Dallas Howard, Dakota Fanning
recommended_movies.description: Bella once again finds herself surrounded by danger as Seattle is ravaged by a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire continues her quest for revenge. In the midst of it all, she is forced to choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision has the potential to ignite the ageless struggle between vampire and werewolf. With her graduation quickly approaching, Bella is confronted with the most important decision of her life.

recommended_movies.title: The Social Network
recommended_movies.cast: Jesse Eisenberg, Andrew Garfield, Armie Hammer, Josh Pence, Justin Timberlake
recommended_movies.description: In 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programmer Mark Zuckerberg begins work on a new concept that eventually turns into the global social network known as Facebook. Six years later, Mark is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend.

recommended_movies.title: Three Steps Above Heaven
recommended_movies.cast: María Valverde, Mario Casas, Álvaro Cervantes, Marina Salas, Nerea Camacho
recommended_movies.description: Story of two young people who belong to different worlds. It is the chronicle of a love improbable, almost impossible but inevitable dragging in a frantic journey they discover the first great love. Babi is a girl from upper-middle class that is educated in goodness and innocence . Hache is a rebellious boy, impulsive, unconscious, has a appetite for risk and danger embodied in endless fights and illegal motorbike races, the limit of common sense

recommended_movies.title: The Town
recommended_movies.cast: Ben Affleck, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Hall, Jon Hamm, Blake Lively
recommended_movies.country: United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Doug MacRay is a longtime thief, who, smarter than the rest of his crew, is looking for his chance to exit the game. When a bank job leads to the group kidnapping an attractive branch manager, he takes on the role of monitoring her – but their burgeoning relationship threatens to unveil the identities of Doug and his crew to the FBI Agent who is on their case.

recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: Elite Squad: The Enemy Within
recommended_movies.cast: Wagner Moura, Irandhir Santos, André Ramiro, Pedro Van-Held, Maria Ribeiro
recommended_movies.description: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor.

recommended_movies.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World
recommended_movies.cast: Michael Cera, Mary Elizabeth Winstead, Ellen Wong, Kieran Culkin, Alison Pill
recommended_movies.country: Japan, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: As bass guitarist for a garage-rock band, Scott Pilgrim has never had trouble getting a girlfriend; usually, the problem is getting rid of them. But when Ramona Flowers skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an army of ex-boyfriends who will stop at nothing to eliminate him from her list of suitors.

recommended_movies.title: 127 Hours
recommended_movies.cast: James Franco, Kate Mara, Amber Tamblyn, Clémence Poésy, Lizzy Caplan
recommended_movies.country: France, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: The true story of mountain climber Aron Ralston's remarkable adventure to save himself after a fallen boulder crashes on his arm and traps him in an isolated canyon in Utah.

recommended_movies.title: Incendies
recommended_movies.cast: Lubna Azabal, Mélissa Désormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette, Rémy Girard, Allen Altman
recommended_movies.description: A mother's last wishes send twins Jeanne and Simon on a journey to Middle East in search of their tangled roots. Adapted from Wajdi Mouawad's acclaimed play, Incendies tells the powerful and moving tale of two young adults' voyage to the core of deep-rooted hatred, never-ending wars and enduring love.

recommended_movies.title: Flipped
recommended_movies.cast: Madeline Carroll, Callan McAuliffe, Rebecca De Mornay, Anthony Edwards, John Mahoney
recommended_movies.description: When Juli meets Bryce in the second grade, she knows it's true love. After spending six years trying to convince Bryce the same, she's ready to give up - until he starts to reconsider.

recommended_movies.title: Love & Other Drugs
recommended_movies.cast: Jake Gyllenhaal, Anne Hathaway, Oliver Platt, Hank Azaria, Josh Gad
recommended_movies.description: Maggie is an alluring free spirit who won't let anyone – or anything – tie her down. But she meets her match in Jamie, whose relentless and nearly infallible charm serves him well with the ladies and the cutthroat world of pharmaceutical sales. Maggie and Jamie's evolving relationship takes them both by surprise, as they find themselves under the influence of the ultimate drug: love.

recommended_movies.title: Eat Pray Love
recommended_movies.cast: Julia Roberts, Javier Bardem, James Franco, Billy Crudup, Richard Jenkins
recommended_movies.description: Liz Gilbert had everything a modern woman is supposed to dream of having – a husband, a house and a successful career – yet like so many others, she found herself lost, confused and searching for what she really wanted in life. Newly divorced and at a crossroads, Gilbert steps out of her comfort zone, risking everything to change her life, embarking on a journey around the world that becomes a quest for self-discovery. In her travels, she discovers the true pleasure of nourishment by eating in Italy, the power of prayer in India and, finally and unexpectedly, the inner peace and balance of true love in Bali.

recommended_movies.description: Dean and Cindy live a quiet life in a modest neighborhood. They appear to have the world at their feet at the outset of the relationship. However, his lack of ambition and her retreat into self-absorption cause potentially irreversible cracks in their marriage.

user_story: Tôi vừa thăng chức, lương rất cao nhưng tối về lại thấy cô đơn và tự hỏi mục đích sống của mình là gì. Tiền bạc hình như không làm tôi hạnh phúc.

data.counselor_message:
Mình hiểu cảm giác của bạn khi đạt được thành công nhưng vẫn cảm thấy trống rỗng và tự hỏi về mục đích sống. Dưới đây là một số bộ phim có thể giúp bạn tìm thấy ý nghĩa và cảm hứng trong cuộc sống:

1. **The Karate Kid**: Bộ phim này không chỉ nói về võ thuật mà còn về sự trưởng thành và tìm thấy sức mạnh bên trong. Nó có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng hành trình tìm kiếm ý nghĩa không chỉ nằm ở thành công vật chất mà còn ở việc phát triển bản thân và tìm thấy sự bình yên nội tâm.

2. **The Social Network**: Câu chuyện về sự thành công của Mark Zuckerberg cũng là một lời nhắc nhở rằng thành công không phải lúc nào cũng đi đôi với hạnh phúc. Bộ phim này có thể giúp bạn suy ngẫm về giá trị của các mối quan hệ và sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống cá nhân.

3. **127 Hours**: Đây là một câu chuyện về sự kiên cường và ý chí sống mãnh liệt. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn để tìm thấy sức mạnh bên trong và khám phá những điều thực sự quan trọng trong cuộc sống của mình.

4. **Eat Pray Love**: Bộ phim này là một hành trình tìm kiếm bản thân và ý nghĩa cuộc sống. Nó có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng đôi khi, việc bước ra khỏi vùng an toàn và khám phá thế giới có thể mang lại những trải nghiệm và sự thấu hiểu sâu sắc hơn về bản thân.

5. **Love & Other Drugs**: Bộ phim này khám phá tình yêu và sự kết nối giữa con người, nhắc nhở chúng ta rằng tình yêu và mối quan hệ có thể mang lại hạnh phúc và ý nghĩa thực sự trong cuộc sống.

Hy vọng những bộ phim này sẽ giúp bạn tìm thấy sự đồng cảm và cảm hứng để khám phá mục đích sống của mình.

recommended_movies.title: The Karate Kid
recommended_movies.cast: Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson, Wenwen Han, Wang ZhenWei
recommended_movies.country: China, Hong Kong, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Twelve-year-old Dre Parker could have been the most popular kid in Detroit, but his mother's latest career move has landed him in China. Dre immediately falls for his classmate Mei Ying but the cultural differences make such a friendship impossible. Even worse, Dre's feelings make him an enemy of the class bully, Cheng. With no friends in a strange land, Dre has nowhere to turn but maintenance man Mr. Han, who is a kung fu master. As Han teaches Dre that kung fu is not about punches and parries, but maturity and calm, Dre realizes that facing down the bullies will be the fight of his life.

recommended_movies.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
recommended_movies.cast: Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner, Bryce Dallas Howard, Dakota Fanning
recommended_movies.description: Bella once again finds herself surrounded by danger as Seattle is ravaged by a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire continues her quest for revenge. In the midst of it all, she is forced to choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision has the potential to ignite the ageless struggle between vampire and werewolf. With her graduation quickly approaching, Bella is confronted with the most important decision of her life.

recommended_movies.title: The Social Network
recommended_movies.cast: Jesse Eisenberg, Andrew Garfield, Armie Hammer, Josh Pence, Justin Timberlake
recommended_movies.description: In 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programmer Mark Zuckerberg begins work on a new concept that eventually turns into the global social network known as Facebook. Six years later, Mark is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend.

recommended_movies.title: Three Steps Above Heaven
recommended_movies.cast: María Valverde, Mario Casas, Álvaro Cervantes, Marina Salas, Nerea Camacho
recommended_movies.description: Story of two young people who belong to different worlds. It is the chronicle of a love improbable, almost impossible but inevitable dragging in a frantic journey they discover the first great love. Babi is a girl from upper-middle class that is educated in goodness and innocence . Hache is a rebellious boy, impulsive, unconscious, has a appetite for risk and danger embodied in endless fights and illegal motorbike races, the limit of common sense

recommended_movies.title: The Town
recommended_movies.cast: Ben Affleck, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Hall, Jon Hamm, Blake Lively
recommended_movies.country: United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Doug MacRay is a longtime thief, who, smarter than the rest of his crew, is looking for his chance to exit the game. When a bank job leads to the group kidnapping an attractive branch manager, he takes on the role of monitoring her – but their burgeoning relationship threatens to unveil the identities of Doug and his crew to the FBI Agent who is on their case.

recommended_movies.title: Black Swan
recommended_movies.cast: Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, Vincent Cassel, Barbara Hershey, Winona Ryder
recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: Elite Squad: The Enemy Within
recommended_movies.cast: Wagner Moura, Irandhir Santos, André Ramiro, Pedro Van-Held, Maria Ribeiro
recommended_movies.description: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor.

recommended_movies.title: Predators
recommended_movies.cast: Adrien Brody, Topher Grace, Alice Braga, Oleg Taktarov, Laurence Fishburne
recommended_movies.description: A group of cold-blooded killers find themselves trapped on an alien planet to be hunted by extraterrestrial Predators.

recommended_movies.title: Megamind
recommended_movies.cast: Will Ferrell, Tina Fey, Jonah Hill, Brad Pitt, David Cross
recommended_movies.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommended_movies.description: After Megamind, a highly intelligent alien supervillain, defeats his long-time nemesis Metro Man, Megamind creates a new hero to fight, but must act to save the city when his "creation" becomes an even worse villain than he was.

recommended_movies.title: The Expendables
recommended_movies.cast: Sylvester Stallone, Jason Statham, Jet Li, Dolph Lundgren, Eric Roberts
recommended_movies.description: Barney Ross leads a band of highly skilled mercenaries including knife enthusiast Lee Christmas, a martial arts expert Yin Yang, heavy weapons specialist Hale Caesar, demolitionist Toll Road, and a loose-cannon sniper Gunner Jensen. When the group is commissioned by the mysterious Mr. Church to assassinate the dictator of a small South American island, Barney and Lee visit the remote locale to scout out their opposition and discover the true nature of the conflict engulfing the city.

recommended_movies.title: Black Swan
recommended_movies.cast: Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, Vincent Cassel, Barbara Hershey, Winona Ryder
recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: From Paris with Love
recommended_movies.cast: John Travolta, Jonathan Rhys Meyers, Kasia Smutniak, Richard Durden, Bing Yin
recommended_movies.description: James Reese has a good job as an ambassador's aid in France, but his real passion is a side gig—working in a minor role in the CIA. He would love to be a full-fledged agent and can't believe his luck when he lands an assignment with Charlie Wax. Trigger-happy Charlie soon has James crying for his desk job, but when he learns that the same guys they're trying to catch are after him, James realises that Charlie may be his only hope of survival.

recommended_movies.title: The Other Guys
recommended_movies.cast: Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Eva Mendes, Michael Keaton, Steve Coogan
recommended_movies.description: Unlike their heroic counterparts on the force, desk-bound NYPD detectives Gamble and Hoitz garner no headlines as they work day to day. When a seemingly minor case turns out to be a big deal, the two cops get the opportunity to finally prove to their comrades that they have the right stuff.

user_story: Tôi vừa vui vì được nghỉ việc nhưng cũng sợ vì không có thu nhập. Một cảm giác vừa tự do vừa bất an trộn lẫn.

data.counselor_message:
Mình hiểu cảm giác của bạn, vừa vui mừng vì có thời gian tự do nhưng cũng lo lắng về tương lai. Dưới đây là một số bộ phim có thể giúp bạn cảm thấy thoải mái hơn trong tình huống này:

1. **Shrek Forever After**: Bộ phim này nói về việc tìm lại bản thân và giá trị thực sự của cuộc sống. Shrek cảm thấy mất mát và không hài lòng với cuộc sống hiện tại, nhưng qua hành trình của mình, anh nhận ra giá trị của những điều mình đã có. Điều này có thể giúp bạn nhìn nhận lại những gì quan trọng trong cuộc sống của mình.

2. **The Karate Kid**: Đây là câu chuyện về sự trưởng thành và vượt qua khó khăn. Dre học cách đối mặt với những thách thức mới và tìm thấy sức mạnh bên trong mình. Bộ phim này có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn để đối mặt với những bất an và tìm ra con đường mới cho bản thân.

3. **Grown Ups**: Bộ phim này mang lại tiếng cười và nhắc nhở chúng ta về giá trị của tình bạn và gia đình. Khi bạn cảm thấy bất an, việc nhớ lại những mối quan hệ quan trọng có thể giúp bạn cảm thấy an tâm hơn.

4. **Despicable Me**: Gru, một nhân vật tưởng chừng như xấu xa, lại tìm thấy niềm vui và ý nghĩa trong việc chăm sóc ba đứa trẻ mồ côi. Bộ phim này có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng đôi khi những thay đổi bất ngờ có thể mang lại những điều tốt đẹp không ngờ.

5. **Toy Story 3**: Câu chuyện về sự thay đổi và chấp nhận những điều mới mẻ. Các nhân vật trong phim phải đối mặt với việc rời xa quá khứ và tìm kiếm một tương lai mới. Điều này có thể giúp bạn cảm thấy thoải mái hơn với sự thay đổi trong cuộc sống của mình.

Hy vọng những bộ phim này sẽ mang lại cho bạn những giây phút thư giãn và suy ngẫm tích cực!

recommended_movies.title: Shrek Forever After
recommended_movies.cast: Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz, Antonio Banderas, Walt Dohrn
recommended_movies.description: A bored and domesticated Shrek pacts with deal-maker Rumpelstiltskin to get back to feeling like a real ogre again, but when he's duped and sent to a twisted version of Far Far Away—where Rumpelstiltskin is king, ogres are hunted, and he and Fiona have never met—he sets out to restore his world and reclaim his true love.

recommended_movies.title: The Karate Kid
recommended_movies.cast: Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson, Wenwen Han, Wang ZhenWei
recommended_movies.country: China, Hong Kong, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Twelve-year-old Dre Parker could have been the most popular kid in Detroit, but his mother's latest career move has landed him in China. Dre immediately falls for his classmate Mei Ying but the cultural differences make such a friendship impossible. Even worse, Dre's feelings make him an enemy of the class bully, Cheng. With no friends in a strange land, Dre has nowhere to turn but maintenance man Mr. Han, who is a kung fu master. As Han teaches Dre that kung fu is not about punches and parries, but maturity and calm, Dre realizes that facing down the bullies will be the fight of his life.

recommended_movies.title: Grown Ups
recommended_movies.cast: Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock, David Spade, Rob Schneider
recommended_movies.description: After their high school basketball coach passes away, five good friends and former teammates reunite for a Fourth of July holiday weekend.

recommended_movies.title: Despicable Me
recommended_movies.cast: Steve Carell, Jason Segel, Miranda Cosgrove, Elsie Fisher, Dana Gaier
recommended_movies.description: Villainous Gru lives up to his reputation as a despicable, deplorable and downright unlikable guy when he hatches a plan to steal the moon from the sky. But he has a tough time staying on task after three orphans land in his care.

recommended_movies.title: Toy Story 3
recommended_movies.cast: Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Don Rickles, Wallace Shawn
recommended_movies.description: Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.

recommended_movies.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
recommended_movies.cast: Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner, Bryce Dallas Howard, Dakota Fanning
recommended_movies.description: Bella once again finds herself surrounded by danger as Seattle is ravaged by a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire continues her quest for revenge. In the midst of it all, she is forced to choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision has the potential to ignite the ageless struggle between vampire and werewolf. With her graduation quickly approaching, Bella is confronted with the most important decision of her life.

recommended_movies.title: The Social Network
recommended_movies.cast: Jesse Eisenberg, Andrew Garfield, Armie Hammer, Josh Pence, Justin Timberlake
recommended_movies.description: In 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programmer Mark Zuckerberg begins work on a new concept that eventually turns into the global social network known as Facebook. Six years later, Mark is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend.

recommended_movies.title: The Town
recommended_movies.cast: Ben Affleck, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Hall, Jon Hamm, Blake Lively
recommended_movies.country: United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Doug MacRay is a longtime thief, who, smarter than the rest of his crew, is looking for his chance to exit the game. When a bank job leads to the group kidnapping an attractive branch manager, he takes on the role of monitoring her – but their burgeoning relationship threatens to unveil the identities of Doug and his crew to the FBI Agent who is on their case.

recommended_movies.title: Black Swan
recommended_movies.cast: Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, Vincent Cassel, Barbara Hershey, Winona Ryder
recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: Elite Squad: The Enemy Within
recommended_movies.cast: Wagner Moura, Irandhir Santos, André Ramiro, Pedro Van-Held, Maria Ribeiro
recommended_movies.description: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor.

recommended_movies.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World
recommended_movies.cast: Michael Cera, Mary Elizabeth Winstead, Ellen Wong, Kieran Culkin, Alison Pill
recommended_movies.country: Japan, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: As bass guitarist for a garage-rock band, Scott Pilgrim has never had trouble getting a girlfriend; usually, the problem is getting rid of them. But when Ramona Flowers skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an army of ex-boyfriends who will stop at nothing to eliminate him from her list of suitors.

recommended_movies.title: 127 Hours
recommended_movies.cast: James Franco, Kate Mara, Amber Tamblyn, Clémence Poésy, Lizzy Caplan
recommended_movies.country: France, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: The true story of mountain climber Aron Ralston's remarkable adventure to save himself after a fallen boulder crashes on his arm and traps him in an isolated canyon in Utah.

recommended_movies.title: Incendies
recommended_movies.cast: Lubna Azabal, Mélissa Désormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette, Rémy Girard, Allen Altman
recommended_movies.description: A mother's last wishes send twins Jeanne and Simon on a journey to Middle East in search of their tangled roots. Adapted from Wajdi Mouawad's acclaimed play, Incendies tells the powerful and moving tale of two young adults' voyage to the core of deep-rooted hatred, never-ending wars and enduring love.

recommended_movies.title: Titanic II
recommended_movies.cast: Shane van Dyke, Marie Westbrook, Bruce Davison, Brooke Burns, Michelle Glavan
recommended_movies.description: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic 2," follows the path of its namesake. But when a tsunami hurls an ice berg into the new ship's path, the passengers and crew must fight to avoid a similar fate.

recommended_movies.title: Eat Pray Love
recommended_movies.cast: Julia Roberts, Javier Bardem, James Franco, Billy Crudup, Richard Jenkins
recommended_movies.description: Liz Gilbert had everything a modern woman is supposed to dream of having – a husband, a house and a successful career – yet like so many others, she found herself lost, confused and searching for what she really wanted in life. Newly divorced and at a crossroads, Gilbert steps out of her comfort zone, risking everything to change her life, embarking on a journey around the world that becomes a quest for self-discovery. In her travels, she discovers the true pleasure of nourishment by eating in Italy, the power of prayer in India and, finally and unexpectedly, the inner peace and balance of true love in Bali.

recommended_movies.title: My Name Is Khan
recommended_movies.cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Kajol, Arjan Aujla, Jimmy Shergill, Sonya Jehan
recommended_movies.country: China, India, United Arab Emirates, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.

recommended_movies.title: Blue Valentine
recommended_movies.cast: Ryan Gosling, Michelle Williams, John Doman, Mike Vogel, Ben Shenkman
recommended_movies.description: Dean and Cindy live a quiet life in a modest neighborhood. They appear to have the world at their feet at the outset of the relationship. However, his lack of ambition and her retreat into self-absorption cause potentially irreversible cracks in their marriage.

user_story: Tâm trạng đang chạm đáy nỗi đau, bầu trời hôm nay xám xịt như cuộc đời mình vậy.

data.counselor_message:
Mình hiểu cảm giác của bạn lúc này, khi mọi thứ dường như đang chìm trong bóng tối. Dưới đây là một số bộ phim có thể giúp bạn tìm thấy một chút ánh sáng và sự đồng cảm trong những lúc khó khăn này:

1. **Shutter Island**: Bộ phim này không chỉ là một câu chuyện ly kỳ mà còn là một hành trình khám phá tâm lý sâu sắc. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng đôi khi, việc đối mặt với những bóng tối trong tâm hồn là cần thiết để tìm ra sự thật và sự giải thoát.

2. **Room in Rome**: Đây là một câu chuyện về sự kết nối và khám phá bản thân. Nó nhắc nhở chúng ta rằng ngay cả trong những khoảnh khắc ngắn ngủi, tình yêu và sự hiểu biết có thể mang lại sự an ủi và ý nghĩa.

3. **The Twilight Saga: Eclipse**: Mặc dù là một câu chuyện giả tưởng, nhưng nó nói về những lựa chọn khó khăn và tình yêu vượt qua mọi rào cản. Điều này có thể giúp bạn nhận ra rằng dù cuộc sống có phức tạp đến đâu, tình yêu và sự kiên định có thể dẫn lối.

4. **Three Steps Above Heaven**: Bộ phim này là về tình yêu đầu đời và những cảm xúc mãnh liệt mà nó mang lại. Nó có thể giúp bạn nhớ lại những khoảnh khắc đẹp đẽ và niềm tin vào tình yêu, ngay cả khi mọi thứ dường như không thể.

5. **The Town**: Đây là một câu chuyện về sự chuộc lỗi và tìm kiếm một con đường mới. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn rằng dù quá khứ có khó khăn thế nào, luôn có cơ hội để thay đổi và tìm thấy hy vọng.

6. **Black Swan**: Bộ phim này khám phá sự đấu tranh nội tâm và áp lực của sự hoàn hảo. Nó có thể giúp bạn hiểu rằng việc chấp nhận bản thân và những khuyết điểm của mình là một phần quan trọng của hành trình tìm kiếm hạnh phúc.

7. **El Infierno**: Một câu chuyện về sự sống còn và đối mặt với những thử thách khắc nghiệt. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng ngay cả trong những hoàn cảnh tồi tệ nhất, con người vẫn có thể tìm thấy sức mạnh để vượt qua.

8. **Elite Squad: The Enemy Within**: Bộ phim này nói về sự đấu tranh chống lại tham nhũng và bất công. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn rằng sự kiên định và lòng dũng cảm có thể tạo ra sự khác biệt.

9. **Scott Pilgrim vs. the World**: Một bộ phim vui nhộn và đầy màu sắc về tình yêu và sự trưởng thành. Nó có thể mang lại cho bạn những giây phút thư giãn và nhắc nhở rằng cuộc sống cũng có những khoảnh khắc vui vẻ và đáng nhớ.

10. **127 Hours**: Câu chuyện về sự kiên cường và ý chí sống mãnh liệt. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn rằng dù trong hoàn cảnh khó khăn nhất, con người vẫn có thể tìm thấy sức mạnh để vượt qua.

11. **Incendies**: Một hành trình khám phá quá khứ và tìm kiếm sự thật. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng việc đối mặt với những đau thương có thể dẫn đến sự giải thoát và hòa bình.

12. **Eat Pray Love**: Một câu chuyện về hành trình tìm kiếm bản thân và hạnh phúc. Nó có thể truyền cảm hứng cho bạn rằng đôi khi, việc bước ra khỏi vùng an toàn và khám phá thế giới có thể mang lại sự thay đổi tích cực.

13. **My Name Is Khan**: Một câu chuyện cảm động về tình yêu và lòng nhân ái vượt qua mọi rào cản. Nó có thể giúp bạn thấy rằng sự tử tế và lòng dũng cảm có thể thay đổi cuộc sống của chúng ta và những người xung quanh.

14. **Blue Valentine**: Một cái nhìn chân thực về tình yêu và những thách thức trong mối quan hệ. Nó có thể giúp bạn hiểu rằng mọi mối quan hệ đều có những lúc thăng trầm, và việc chấp nhận điều đó là một phần của cuộc sống.

Hy vọng rằng những bộ phim này sẽ mang lại cho bạn một chút an ủi và động lực trong thời gian khó khăn này.

recommended_movies.title: Shutter Island
recommended_movies.cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Mark Ruffalo, Ben Kingsley, Max von Sydow, Michelle Williams
recommended_movies.description: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommended_movies.title: Room in Rome
recommended_movies.cast: Elena Anaya, Natasha Yarovenko, Enrico Lo Verso, Najwa Nimri, Ander Malles
recommended_movies.description: A hotel room in the center of Rome serves as the setting for Alba and Natasha, two sexy and recently acquainted women, to have a physical adventure that touches their very souls.

recommended_movies.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
recommended_movies.cast: Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner, Bryce Dallas Howard, Dakota Fanning
recommended_movies.description: Bella once again finds herself surrounded by danger as Seattle is ravaged by a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire continues her quest for revenge. In the midst of it all, she is forced to choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision has the potential to ignite the ageless struggle between vampire and werewolf. With her graduation quickly approaching, Bella is confronted with the most important decision of her life.

recommended_movies.title: Three Steps Above Heaven
recommended_movies.cast: María Valverde, Mario Casas, Álvaro Cervantes, Marina Salas, Nerea Camacho
recommended_movies.description: Story of two young people who belong to different worlds. It is the chronicle of a love improbable, almost impossible but inevitable dragging in a frantic journey they discover the first great love. Babi is a girl from upper-middle class that is educated in goodness and innocence . Hache is a rebellious boy, impulsive, unconscious, has a appetite for risk and danger embodied in endless fights and illegal motorbike races, the limit of common sense

recommended_movies.title: The Town
recommended_movies.cast: Ben Affleck, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Hall, Jon Hamm, Blake Lively
recommended_movies.country: United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Doug MacRay is a longtime thief, who, smarter than the rest of his crew, is looking for his chance to exit the game. When a bank job leads to the group kidnapping an attractive branch manager, he takes on the role of monitoring her – but their burgeoning relationship threatens to unveil the identities of Doug and his crew to the FBI Agent who is on their case.

recommended_movies.title: Black Swan
recommended_movies.cast: Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, Vincent Cassel, Barbara Hershey, Winona Ryder
recommended_movies.description: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional ambition. When artistic director Thomas Leroy decides to replace prima ballerina Beth MacIntyre for the opening production of their new season, Swan Lake, Nina is his first choice.

recommended_movies.title: El Infierno
recommended_movies.cast: Damián Alcázar, Joaquín Cosío, Ernesto Gómez Cruz, María Rojo, Elizabeth Cervantes
recommended_movies.description: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommended_movies.title: Elite Squad: The Enemy Within
recommended_movies.cast: Wagner Moura, Irandhir Santos, André Ramiro, Pedro Van-Held, Maria Ribeiro
recommended_movies.description: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor.

recommended_movies.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World
recommended_movies.cast: Michael Cera, Mary Elizabeth Winstead, Ellen Wong, Kieran Culkin, Alison Pill
recommended_movies.country: Japan, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: As bass guitarist for a garage-rock band, Scott Pilgrim has never had trouble getting a girlfriend; usually, the problem is getting rid of them. But when Ramona Flowers skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an army of ex-boyfriends who will stop at nothing to eliminate him from her list of suitors.

recommended_movies.title: 127 Hours
recommended_movies.cast: James Franco, Kate Mara, Amber Tamblyn, Clémence Poésy, Lizzy Caplan
recommended_movies.country: France, United Kingdom, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: The true story of mountain climber Aron Ralston's remarkable adventure to save himself after a fallen boulder crashes on his arm and traps him in an isolated canyon in Utah.

recommended_movies.title: Incendies
recommended_movies.cast: Lubna Azabal, Mélissa Désormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette, Rémy Girard, Allen Altman
recommended_movies.description: A mother's last wishes send twins Jeanne and Simon on a journey to Middle East in search of their tangled roots. Adapted from Wajdi Mouawad's acclaimed play, Incendies tells the powerful and moving tale of two young adults' voyage to the core of deep-rooted hatred, never-ending wars and enduring love.

recommended_movies.title: Eat Pray Love
recommended_movies.cast: Julia Roberts, Javier Bardem, James Franco, Billy Crudup, Richard Jenkins
recommended_movies.description: Liz Gilbert had everything a modern woman is supposed to dream of having – a husband, a house and a successful career – yet like so many others, she found herself lost, confused and searching for what she really wanted in life. Newly divorced and at a crossroads, Gilbert steps out of her comfort zone, risking everything to change her life, embarking on a journey around the world that becomes a quest for self-discovery. In her travels, she discovers the true pleasure of nourishment by eating in Italy, the power of prayer in India and, finally and unexpectedly, the inner peace and balance of true love in Bali.

recommended_movies.title: My Name Is Khan
recommended_movies.cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Kajol, Arjan Aujla, Jimmy Shergill, Sonya Jehan
recommended_movies.country: China, India, United Arab Emirates, United States of America
recommended_movies.description: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.

recommended_movies.title: Blue Valentine
recommended_movies.cast: Ryan Gosling, Michelle Williams, John Doman, Mike Vogel, Ben Shenkman
recommended_movies.description: Dean and Cindy live a quiet life in a modest neighborhood. They appear to have the world at their feet at the outset of the relationship. However, his lack of ambition and her retreat into self-absorption cause potentially irreversible cracks in their marriage.
